name: Keycloak — Identity & Access Management with YugabyteDB
postStartCommand: bash -c 'bash .devcontainer/scripts/start-keycloak.sh && echo "" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → keycloak-demo   (guided Keycloak + YugabyteDB demo)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → ysql             (YSQL shell → keycloak database)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → keycloak-ws     (Workshop shell for manual exercises)"'
